title.en: The Taixing Dao Master sensed that a disciple w...

content.en:
"Come in!"

The Taixing Dao Master sensed that a disciple was coming over and said.

Soon.

A disciple of the Eternal Dao Realm came to report: "Mountain Lord, a half-step Eternal Realm God Realm powerhouse has come to visit our Xuanling Mountain, and said that he is willing to help the Mountain Lord suppress the Eternal Dao Species. "

"What!"

The Taixing Dao Master was shocked and excited, and immediately passed over in person.

......

Outside Xuanling Mountain.

Ye Tian quickly saw the Taixing Dao Lord, and it could be seen from the Taixing Dao Lord's body that the Taixing Dao Lord's aura was very unstable, and the rotten aura on his body was too heavy, and it was estimated that it would not be long before the demon seed would turn into a demon.

At this time, the Taixing Dao Lord may turn into a demon seed in a battle, but it is also the most dangerous time, and no one dares to provoke him casually, otherwise he will really fight hard.

"I've seen the Taixing Dao Lord, I'm the Ye Tian Country Lord from the Ten Thousand Gods Kingdom Alliance!"

Ye Tian introduced himself.

"Lord Ye Tianguo, please come in!"

The Taixing Dao Lord was very polite to Ye Tian and invited Ye Tian to enter Xuanling Mountain.

Subsequently.

They started talking about business.

"Ye Tianguo Lord, I heard from my disciple, are you willing to help me suppress the Eternal Dao Seed Problem?" said the Taixing Dao Lord with some skepticism.

At first, he thought that a certain half-step Eternal Realm God Realm powerhouse who was about to die wanted to help him, but it turned out that Ye Tian was not injured at all, and there was not even a trace of demon seeding, obviously the problem of the Eternal Dao Seed was definitely not big.

Why would such a half-step Eternal Realm God Realm powerhouse be willing to help him, so he was a little skeptical, but Ye Tian actually said it, it wouldn't be fooling him, right?

"Yes!"

Ye Tian nodded.

"Ye Tian Guo Lord, what do you want?" asked the Taixing Dao Lord.

He didn't care why Ye Tian saved him, even if Ye Tian died, he didn't care, he didn't dare to inquire deeply, in case Ye Tian repented, wouldn't he have to regret and die.

Therefore, the treatment can be carried out after the direct conditions are negotiated.

"I want an Eternal Dao Kind Solidification Secret Technique!"

Ye Tian said.

"Do you want the Eternal Dao Seed Solidification Secret Technique?" the Taixing Dao Lord frowned.

"If the Taixing Dao Lord is unwilling, then I won't sacrifice myself. Ye Tian said.

"No, I agree!"

The Taixing Dao Lord thought that Ye Tian was sacrificing himself to help his own forces, and let his forces have an Eternal Dao Kind Solidification Secret Technique, which was somewhat reasonable.

But Ye Tian is inevitably too selfless.

"Lord Ye Tianguo, I can't give you too good an Eternal Dao Seed Solidification Secret Technique, because our Xuanling Mountain is an ordinary Eternal Dao Seed Solidification Secret Technique, if you want, how about signing a contract now?"

"Yes!"

Ye Tian nodded.

Immediately.

Ye Tian signed a contract with the Taixing Dao Lord, and several other half-step Eternal Realm God Realm powerhouses in Xuanling Mountain all appeared and also participated in signing the contract, after all, this was a cooperation with Xuanling Mountain, not just with the Taixing Dao Lord.

Subsequently.

The Taixing Dao Master of Xuanling Mountain gave Ye Tian a Dao Seed Secret Technique-Dao Seed Transfer Technique!

This Dao Seed Secret Technique is suitable for all Eternal Dao Species, but it is not a transfer of Dao Seeds, but a transfer of Dao Seed power, so as to suppress the problem of Demon Seed Transformation and not affect cultivation.

The Dao Seed Transfer Technique was not very complicated, and Ye Tian quickly practiced it.

Immediately, under the witness of several half-step Eternal Realm Divine Realms in Xuanling Mountain, Ye Tian began to treat the Taixing Dao Master.

"Lord Ye Tianguo, I'm sorry for you!"

Taixing Dao Lord said.

At this moment, he was very excited, after all, he was finally going to solve the problem of the Eternal Dao Seed.

As long as he suppressed the Eternal Dao Seed Problem, he would have enough time to impact the Eternal Realm God Realm!

"Here we go!"

Ye Tian urged the Dao Seed Transfer Technique, and his own Eternal Dao Seed power penetrated into the Eternal Dao Seed on the Taixing Dao Master's body.

During the whole process, the Taixing Dao Lord couldn't resist.

Of course.

The other half-step Eternal Dao Realm in Xuanling Mountain were also worried that Ye Tian would attack the Taixing Dao Master, so they were also watching to prevent Ye Tianxia from hacking his hands, even if this possibility was very low, they had to beware of it!

Rumble!!!!!

Ye Tian's Eternal Dao Seed power continued to penetrate into the Taixing Dao main body, and the Eternal Dao Seed within the Taixing Dao Body absorbed Ye Tian's Eternal Dao Seed power, and gradually suppressed the problem of the Eternal Dao Seed Demon Seed.

Suddenly, the decaying aura on his body gradually decreased, until after a long time, the decaying aura was almost invisible, and it was suppressed by Ye Tian's Eternal Dao Seed power somewhere in the Eternal Dao Seed.

Time passes.

After a long time.

Ye Tian stopped the Dao Seed Transfer Technique, and at this moment, he was extremely weak and didn't have much combat power, but the state of the Taixing Dao Lord was extremely good.

"Hahaha, great!"

The Taixing Dao Lord was excited.

For the time being, there was no question of the Eternal Dao Species, and he was 100% sure that he would break through to the Eternal Realm God Realm.

"Taixing Dao Master, the Eternal Dao Seed Solidification Secret Technique should be given to me!"

Ye Tian said.

The Taixing Dao Lord did not regret it, he still wanted to break through to the Eternal Realm God Realm, naturally he didn't want to be affected by the oath, otherwise he didn't want to break through, and even the Eternal Dao Seed would have problems again.

Thereupon.

The Taixing Dao Lord gave Ye Tian the Eternal Dao Seed Solidification Secret Technique of Xuanling Mountain, and there was no restriction that Ye Tian could teach it to others.

"Taixing Dao Master, I'll take my leave!"

Ye Tian quickly left Xuanling Mountain.

And just after Ye Tian left.

887 A half-step Eternal Realm God Realm said, "Mountain Lord, do you want to kill the Lord of Ye Heavenly Realm?"

"You can't kill it!" the Taixing Dao Lord shook his head, "It's just a mystic spirit solidification technique, even if it spreads, it won't have any effect on us." If we attack him and spread the word, the reputation of our Xuanling Mountain will not be good. Case, I mean, if one day my Eternal Dao problem arises again, and I need another half-step Eternal Realm Divine Realm to treat me, who would dare to come and help???"

When the other half-step Eternal Realm God Realm heard this, they immediately nodded, and they didn't have the idea of attacking Ye Tian.

......

Ye Tian did not leave the Lone Star Realm Alliance immediately, but carefully studied the Xuan Ling Solidification Technique.

"This Xuan Ling Solidification Technique is very mysterious, but it is also very ordinary, and it even has certain side effects!" Ye Tian muttered.

Although this Mysterious Spirit Solidification Technique can accelerate the solidification of the Eternal Dao Seed, it will also accelerate the problem of the Demon Seed of the Eternal Dao Seed.

Like a half-step Eternal Realm God Realm powerhouse, the Eternal Dao Seed is solidified step by step, and it stands to reason that the probability of demon seed transformation will be reduced a lot, especially among the Taixing Dao Lords, the entire Eternal Dao Seed is almost solidified, and in this case, it will also be demonized, which shows how big his Eternal Dao seed problem is.

And it is estimated that there is also a reason for the Xuanling solidification technique.
